Government of Maharashtra

Government Decision No. SCY-2026 / P.No.35 / Aid-3
Madam Kama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032.
Date: 08th April, 2026
Reference: - Government Decision, Revenue & Forest Department No.CLS-2022 / Q.No.349 / M-3, D. 27.03.2023.
The Proposal: -
In the event of a sudden natural disaster in the state, a panchnama has been prepared and a proposal has been received.
Delivering aid to the affected takes a long time. Therefore, in the financial year 2026-27
Assistance to the families of the deceased and assistance to the injured in case of loss of human life due to natural calamities.
Also, distribution of assistance to small and marginal farmers for purchase of livestock in case of loss of livestock.
To make this possible, the State Disaster Response Fund rates the head of account at 2245 0155 and head of account at 2245.
0315 Subject to approval of withdrawal from the treasury on a letter of authority minus (-)
It was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
In case of loss of human life due to natural calamities in the financial year 2026-27, the person who died
The families should be able to provide assistance and immediate assistance to the injured, according to Demand No. C-6; Main
Account Heading 2245, Financing for the Relief of Natural Disasters; 02 Floods, Cyclones, etc.; 101, Grace
Assistance; (91) Expenditure as per the standard of State Disaster Response Fund; (91) (01) Cash Allowance, of deceased persons.
Assistance to families and assistance to the injured (compulsory), 31 grants-in-aid (non-salaried) (2245 0155).
minus (-) the authority to pay the payments as per the rate of the State Disaster Response Fund under the books of accounts.
The letter is being approved for withdrawal from the treasury. as well as in natural disasters.
In case of loss of livestock, it is possible to distribute assistance to farmers with small and marginal landholdings to purchase livestock.
For this, demand No. C-6; Main article title 2245, Financing for the relief of natural disasters;
02 Floods, cyclones, etc.; 117. Assistance to farmers for purchase of livestock; (91) State Disaster Response
Expenditure as per fund standard; (91) (01) Small and marginal landholdings for purchase of livestock instead of dead animals
State under the head Assistance to Farmers (Compulsory), 31 Subsidiary Grants (Non-Payment) (2245 0315)
From the Treasury on a letter of authority minus (-) to pay payments at the rate of the Disaster Response Fund
The amount is being approved for withdrawal.
2. In case of loss of human life / loss of animal in a natural disaster, the relief to be provided to the victims by the concerned Government.
The decision. 27.3.2023 should be provided as per the rates and norms (as per standards) of the State Disaster Response Fund.
3. The said matters were adjudicated by the officer concerned while disbursing the funds on the minus authority letter.
